thought_process: The user is a professor setting up Claude LTI for students. The retrieved context provides a step-by-step guide on setting up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure. I will follow the instructions to provide a safe and accurate response.
response: Hello! To set up the Claude LTI for your students, please follow these steps: 1. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. 2. Click '+ Developer Key' then '+ LTI Key.' 3. Enter the required information, including Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. 4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public. 5. Under Placements, we recommend removing the defaults and adding 'Course Navigation' and 'Assignment Edit' as the options. 6. Click 'Save.' 7. Toggle the state to On. Then, install the Claude LTI as an app in Canvas and turn on the Claude LTI integration in Claude for Education organization settings. If you have any questions, please contact your university's administrator(s).
justification: Corpus explicitly provides the step-by-step guide for setting up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure.
